title: valeriana oblongifolia
intro: Valeriana oblongifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as a type of valerian. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative and anti-anxiety effects due to the presence of valerenic acid and other active compounds. The health benefits of Valeriana oblongifolia include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and relief from symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Valeriana oblongifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be consumed as an essential oil or dried root supplement.
